full_text:
Chen Shao йҷійӮө
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Shao (йҷійӮө). Failed to defend Xiangyang against Cao Ren and Xu Huang. Chen Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
